Despite this, renewable energy has gained new significance due to peaking oil supplies and climate concerns, leading to increased research and development in green technologies. Highaltitude wind power is expected to play a role for centuries, although it may not be the sole solution to all of our energy problems due to its less steady nature compared to high-density fossil fuels.
